description: Machine-readable index of Claude OS conservative invariants; normative prose in policies/invariants.md.

invariants.summary: Non-ok validation statuses never count as passed
Generated adapter is never canonical source
Every generated target has declared canonical source
Strict/release must not depend on experimental without approved path
Autonomous write requires reversibility or rollback
Read-only is autonomous on critical surface when no mutation or secrets
Policy relaxation requires approval and auditable record
Central schema/manifest changes require bump or migration note
No secrets in logs, examples, repo context, or versioned templates
